flashcards.definition: Direction measured clockwise from north; e.g., N 30° E or a three-figure bearing like 030°.
a/sin A = b/sin B = c/sin C; relates sides and opposite angles.
c² = a² + b² − 2ab cos C; generalizes the Pythagorean theorem.
Determining position by measuring angles from known reference points.
Uses signals from ≥ 3 satellites and trilateration to find a receiver's position.
